report.summary: Standup v8 Apr 4: No new agent runs since v7 — delta is standup-only. BTC ~$66,889 (flat), F&G recovering to 29 (Fear) from earlier extreme lows. NFP report today is key catalyst. Production still frozen at e3f63fc — 40th escalation. Publish queue exhausted. 131+ uncommitted files. All content trapped in staging.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE v7 → v8: Standup-only cycle. No build, community, design, eod, or publish agents ran in the past hour. No new content or deployments.

MARKET UPDATE (web search confirmed Apr 4): BTC ~$66,889 (essentially flat vs v7's $66,868). 24h vol $15.3B. BTC opened Apr 3 at $66,888, down 1.7% from Apr 2 open of $68,078. Market weakened after Trump's Iran War address — risk-off sentiment persists.
F&G INDEX: 29 (Fear), up from 28 yesterday and 25 last week. Modest recovery from extreme fear lows but still deeply cautious. Index hit 8 on Apr 2 per some sources — near Terra-Luna 2022 levels.

KEY CATALYST TODAY: U.S. Non-Farm Payrolls report (Apr 4). Weaker print → rate-cut expectations → risk-on rally potential. Hot number → hawkish Fed → further downside. This is the most impactful macro event this week.

BTC CONTEXT: All-time high was $126,198 on Oct 6, 2025. Current price is ~47% below ATH. Critical support at $67,000 — a 3-day close below could trigger next leg down to sub-$60K per CoinDesk analysis.
PUBLISHED PAGES: 704 entries in registry (unchanged from v7). Staging: 128 learn pages. No promotions possible — queue exhausted.
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel Analytics. Market data confirmed via web search. No live traffic delta available.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SINCE v7: No new agent runs except this standup. All carry-over items unchanged.
TODAY'S TOTAL: 33 agent runs (standup×8=$360, build×6=$1,398, community×7=$287, design×5=$300, eod×6=$378, publish×1=$275). $2,998 human-equivalent cost.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (40TH ESCALATION): Production frozen at e3f63fc since Apr 2. 131+ uncommitted files. 704 published slugs, 128 staging learn pages, 20 guides + 5 tool pages + 7 UX fixes + OG images all undeployed. NFP report today could trigger traffic spike — deployed content captures it, frozen content doesn't. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P1 — QUEUE REFILL + SCAFFOLD: PUBLISH_QUEUE exhausted — 2 entries remain (monad-guide, zora — both need page.tsx). Scaffold these then refill queue with 20-50 pages from ~638 orphan inventory. Publish agent idle for 3+ cycles.
P2 — SEO BUG: jupiter-dex-aggregator 'use client' + metadata export conflict (1 remaining).
P3 — TECHNICAL DEBT: 111 phantom published slugs (missing page.tsx → 404s). 141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking). 0/6 API routes rate-limited. defi-yields route has no fallback data.

P4 — CARRY-OVER: mev-guide, solana-vs-ethereum warn status. defi-yields API hardening deferred. market-metrics 404 on prod. 4 tool pages (token-radar, risk-score, sentiment-heatmap, market-recap) built but not promoted.
BLOCKERS: Deploy authorization is the sole blocker. All other work is automatable.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, 40TH ESCALATION): 131+ uncommitted files across 20 guides, 5 tools, 7 UX fixes, OG images, published-pages registry updates. NFP report drops today — macro catalyst could drive search traffic spikes for crypto content. Every hour frozen = compounding opportunity cost. BTC at $67K support with potential breakdown or bounce — either scenario drives search volume. This is a $0 action with maximum ROI.

PRIORITY 2 — SCAFFOLD + QUEUE REFILL: Queue empty = publish agent idle. Scaffold monad-guide + zora page.tsx (unblocks 2 queue items). Then refill with 50-page batch from ~638 orphan pool. Target high-value categories: DeFi tools (capitalize on fear sentiment → 'how to protect' searches), staking guides (stablecoin supply $316B ATH = yield-seeking capital).

PRIORITY 3 — PROMOTE 4 TOOL PAGES: token-radar, risk-score, sentiment-heatmap, market-recap are built but not in PUBLISHED_PAGES. These are high-engagement tool pages that drive retention. Risk-score is especially timely given Drift $285M hack news + extreme fear sentiment.
